name: Tushar Jain
tagline: Full Stack Developer specializing in scalable backend services, microservices, and robust system design.
about:
A passionate Software Developer with experience in architecting and implementing scalable backend solutions using NestJS, Python, and Node.js. Proven ability to design comprehensive systems for healthcare platforms, ERP, and athlete management, including database schemas and API integrations. Skilled in optimizing performance, establishing CI/CD pipelines, and contributing to full-stack development. Recognized for achievements in AI/ML-based recommender systems and selection for Amazon ML Summer School.

For Adizen, we developed a custom demo after understanding specific requirements, showcasing their capabilities effectively For Trijog, I delivered key enhancements to their platform, focusing on both corporate and internal

For Adizen, I supported business development initiatives by creating a comprehensive demo to showcase their capabilities to prospective clients For Trijog, I delivered key enhancements to their Zenflow platform, focusing on both B2
highlights: Architected and developed scalable backend services using NestJS, implementing modular architecture and well-defined REST APIs.
Built Python-based microservices for PDF processing and asynchronous workflows, enabling decoupled and scalable system design.
Designed backend systems for a healthcare platform (Trijog), including booking, invoicing, and communication pipelines.
Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and backend testing workflows, improving deployment reliability and system stability.
Developed backend modules for an ERP system (ERPLite), including epics, stories, and task workflows with reporting capabilities.

projects.name: Contest-Saathi
projects.description: Contest reminder web application, incorporating personalized email notifications for real-time updates. projects.description: Cobra-based CLI tool to streamline user interaction with Gemini AI, enhancing command-line efficiency. Integrated advanced natural language processing capabilities of Gemini AI to provide accurate, real-time responses and information retrieval directly within the terminal.
